meta.scope: Generic supplementary diagrams (all models, not engine-specific)
meta.wire_notation: colour1/colour2 = main colour / stripe colour. Dimension in mm² before colour.

unit_notes.track: Current track number (vertical column in diagram)

meta.data_contract: Use vw_lt_wire_lookup.json as canonical flat wire table.

diagrams.title: Supplementary wiring diagram for headlight washers

ground_points.location: Earth point, behind dash, near fuse box

wires.description: Power supply from X rail to fuse

diagrams.functional_description: When the windscreen washer is activated via E22, J31 relay controls the wash-wipe sequence. J39 is energised simultaneously to power V11 headlight washer pump via M20. The headlight washers only operate when the headlights are on (via E1 terminal 56 enabling J39 coil circuit).

diagrams.title: Supplementary wiring diagram for front and rear foglights

ground_points.location: Earth point, on cross panel/side member
Earth point, behind dash on left
Earth point, behind dash on right

wires.description: To single connector behind cross panel

diagrams.functional_description: Foglights can only be operated when parking/dipped beam is on (E1 terminal 58 enables E23). J5 relay switches the main foglight current. E23 switch has two stages: first click = front fogs via 83a, second click = rear fog via 83b. K13 warning lamp illuminates when rear fog is active. S28 (8A) protects the fog circuit.

diagrams.title: Supplementary wiring diagram for front and rear foglights

components.description: Foglight relay on aux. relay adaptor
Front and rear foglight switch bulb
Fuse, terminal 58b, on aux. relay adaptor

connectors.description: Connector, single, behind air vent trim
Connector, single, behind air vent trim

ground_points.location: Earth point, on dash panel insert
Earth point, behind dash panel, right
Earth point, next to relay plate

diagrams.functional_description: Updated foglight circuit for 1986+ models. J5 relay now on auxiliary relay adaptor. S50 provides fused 58b supply for instrument illumination (R radio, L10 dash lights, L28 cigarette lighter light, L40 foglight switch light). Fog switch E23 requires E1 terminal 58 to be active. K17 warning lamp indicates fog operation.

diagrams.title: Supplementary wiring diagram for dual circuit brakes and handbrake warning lamp
diagrams.title_sv: Tilläggskopplingsschema för dubbelkrets broms och handbromsvarningslampa

components.description: Oil pressure switch (to oil pressure switch)
Dual circuit and handbrake warning lamp

wires.description: Brake switch to left brake light
Brake switch to right brake light

diagrams.functional_description: S6 fuse provides permanent 30 supply to brake light switch F. When brake pedal is pressed, F sends current to M9 and M10 brake lights. K7 warning lamp is triggered by: F9 handbrake switch (handbrake on), or hydraulic brake pressure differential switch (brake circuit failure). F1 oil pressure switch shares earth path.

diagrams.title: Supplementary wiring diagram for fusing of lights in dash with rev counter
diagrams.title_sv: Tilläggskopplingsschema för säkring av instrumentbelysning med varvräknare
diagrams.functional_description: S6 provides main fused supply. E20 controls instrument panel brightness via S50 fuse on relay adaptor. S50 feeds terminal 58b to all panel illumination: L10 dash inserts, L8 clock, L16 fresh air, L28 cigarette lighter, L39 heated rear window switch, and R radio backlight. G5 rev counter receives power via T1a connector. All illumination uses 0.5mm² gr/bl (grey/blue) wires.

diagrams.title: Supplementary wiring diagram for fusing of lights in dash with clock and tachograph
diagrams.title_sv: Tilläggskopplingsschema för säkring av instrumentbelysning med klocka och färdskrivare
diagrams.functional_description: Identical to Fig 13.84 but with G24 tachograph replacing G5 rev counter, and Y clock added. S6 fuse provides main supply. E20 dims panel lights via S50. All illumination on 0.5mm² gr/bl wires. G24 tachograph connects via T2b 2-pin connector behind dash.

diagrams.title: Supplementary wiring diagram for trailer towing

connectors.description: Pin 4 on 14-pin connector on dash panel insert

wires.description: Trailer lamp control from dash connector

diagrams.functional_description: Trailer towing harness taps into existing lighting circuits. S14 (8A) and S13 (8A) provide fused supply for trailer lights. Turn signals, tail lights, and brake lights are connected in parallel with vehicle lights. K18 on dash indicates trailer connection status. All trailer wires are typically 1.0mm². Earth via pins 31 to rear crossmember ground points 18/19.

4cyl_CH.reason: This file is generic (all models) only.
